overview: Integrative medicine practice combining modern healthcare with holistic approaches to treat the whole person and identify root causes of symptoms through comprehensive testing and personalized care plans.
highlights: Comprehensive lab work including cortisol/adrenal and specialty testing (microbiome, food sensitivities)
Tailored health plans with supplement recommendations and lifestyle modifications
Board-certified Nurse Practitioners with extensive clinical experience
targetAudience: People frustrated with conventional medicine who have persistent symptoms despite normal lab results and seek individualized, whole-person health care.
